root.sql: SELECT vr_nsk_010_025000.resignation_approve_date, vr_nsk_010_025000.resignation_approve_id, vr_nsk_010_025000.membership_no, vr_nsk_010_025000.memname, vr_nsk_010_025000.member_group_no, vr_nsk_010_025000.member_group_name, vr_nsk_010_025000.approve_date, vr_nsk_010_025000.mem_type_code, vr_nsk_010_025000.mem_type_desc FROM vr_nsk_010_025000 where 1=1 and resignation_approve_date between '!resignation_approve_date_1!' and '!resignation_approve_date_2!' /*WHERE*/
